## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes (`gofmt`, `go vet`, `go build`, `go test`).
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal paths are committed.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or commands changed (`README.md` / `README.ja.md`).
- [ ] Change is consistent with encave's security model (secrets stay in the
      keyring and out of git; no command prints a stored credential).
